programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.sub-title: Season Special - Greatest Groups of All Time
programme.desc: (PG) Fans voted for the top 15 greatest group dances in the history of the show. Look back at Abby's award-winning and sometimes-shocking choreography.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) Everyone is on edge when Abby announces she’ll be holding her first national open audition in Orlando.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) Cathy’s back and ready to beat Abby with a new team of boys. Abby is nervous and pushes her team, especially Chloe and Kendall, who are dancing solos head-to-head.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms: Episode
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.
